_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: both Sp- and NF1-PANCOs exhibited low proliferative indexes (4% Ki67+ cells)
details: Successfully detected proliferative cells in PANCOs showing 4% Ki67+ cells in both sporadic and NF1-PANCOs
